sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
properly, a point, to prick with, extremity, climax, acme, highest degree, the present point of time
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Accusative case of a noun (“acme”) akin to ἀκή akē (a point) and meaning the same; adverbially just now, that is, still: - yet.
